comments.text: Happy #wingFriday! Back in May over blue waters and under blue skies. It’s been cloudy and rainy here lately, starting to feel a lot more like fall

Arctic air returns to the Northland. Temperatures remain below zero for lows tonight, with single digits for highs. A breezy northwest wind will make it feel as cold as -30° with snow showers near Lake Superior continuing. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/01/12/s...

The Northland will get a break from the winds and showers as a low-pressure system finally moves out of the Great Lakes region. We will see some sunshine at time Friday with light winds and seasonal temperatures. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2024/11/21/t...

An Omega High will keep the Northland pretty much dry and warm through next weekend. Other than some patchy lakeshore fog tonight, enjoy the clear skies and light winds with highs Monday in the 70s away from Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/04/s...

A new high-pressure system will keep the Northland dry tonight, with clouds decreasing throughout Wednesday. A shift in wind direction more to the south will push most highs back to the 70s, with 60s next to Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/30/t...

Fog will again be possible across the Northland tonight, but it won’t be as widespread or as dense in spots. Wednesday will see plenty of sunshine with highs warming back to the 70s, with 60s by Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/23/t...

Dense fog will be likely across the Northland tonight with mild lows and very light winds. The sunshine returns for Thursday, with a light wind coming off Lake Superior will keep highs cooler by the lake. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/10/w...

DENSE FOG LIKELY TONIGHT: The fog has stayed put over Lake Superior this Wednesday, and it will be forming back over the Northland tonight and Thursday morning. Again, take it easy when traveling about with low beams on!

After another mostly cloudy and mild night, a shift in wind direction coming off Lake Superior will cool temperatures in the Northland Thursday. Highs will be in the 30s for many on the Minnesota side, with 40s and low 50s elsewhere. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2026/03/04/w...

After the showers move out tonight, fog will linger across the Northland. A light lake breeze will help those next to Lake Superior avoid the worst of the heat and humidity that will cover the region Tuesday. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JUNE 8, 2026: A #warm front brings plenty of #showers and #thunderstorms through the #Northland Sunday night and Monday. #Winds remain light, keeping the #cooler by the lake conditions ongoing. Low #temperatures will be in the 40s, 50s […] [Original post on newsie.social]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JULY 3, 2025: A high-pressure system will settle near #LakeSuperior, providing the #Northland with #clear skies Wednesday night, very light #winds, and lows in the 50s. Thursday will see a few #clouds return as winds will be coming off the lake. That will keep high […]

Gonna be a bit chilly camping this week with lows expected in the 30’s. We’ll be in the #teardrop but now power other than solar. Snuggle up with the three hounds 🐾🐾🐾 . Bitter sweet drive up with the current fire situation, heart goes out to all those affected 🙏
#NorthShore #LakeSuperior

Fog will be likely over the Northland Tuesday night as a high-pressure system moves into the Great Lakes region. Enjoy more sunshine for Wednesday with an east wind keeping temperatures cooler by Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/09/t...

A low-pressure system over Hudson Bay will increase winds over the Northland to a breezy by Thanksgiving. It will also allow lake effect snow showers to form over Lake Superior and large inland lakes. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2024/11/27/w...

It's going to be a very wet and very windy next 24 hours in the Northland as a strong storm system passes through the region. The Lake Superior shorelines will also see high waves through Tuesday. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2024/11/18/m...

It will be a windy Sunday night as a storm system leaves the Northland. Some gusts near Lake Superior will be up to 50 mph. Veterans Day Monday will see clearing skies, calming winds, and seasonal temperatures. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2024/11/10/s...

WINDY SUNDAY NIGHT: A low-pressure system will pass near the Northland tonight, creating strong winds through Monday morning. Locations near Lake Superior will see gusts up to 50 mph possible. Seems fitting for the anniversary of the Edmund Fitzgerald sinking, doesn't it?

The Northland will have one more arctic cold night, with locations away from Lake Superior having the coldest temperatures and wind chills. Light snow showers will pass through the region Wednesday. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/02/18/t...

HOW COLD WAS TUESDAY MORNING?: It was a few degrees warmer than forecasted, but temperatures and wind chills were back to arctic and dangerous levels in the Northland this morning. We have one more bitter cold night Tuesday night, with the worst conditions away from Lake Superior.

HOT ENOUGH FOR YOU?: Monday saw another unseasonably warm day for the Northland with highs reaching the upper 50s and 60s. Plenty of record highs for March 10 were broken or tied. The exception to the heat could be found right along Lake Superior in the Twin Ports and North Shore.

A high-pressure system will keep the Northland clear and cool tonight with lows just before the freezing point. We warm back to the 60s for highs for many of us Wednesday with it cooler next to Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/04/29/t...

Rain showers moving into the Northland will become a rain/snow mix late tonight with minor accumulation possible near Lake Superior. They will move out throughout the day Monday with seasonal highs. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/04/20/s...

A stagnant weather pattern continues for the Northland. That means more isolated pop-up showers Wednesday afternoon with seasonal temperatures, but slightly cooler next to Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/27/t...

The Northland will remain dry through the rest of the Memorial Day holiday weekend thanks to a high-pressure system. A bit of patchy frost will be possible tonight, with an east wind keeping Lake Superior shorelines cooler Monday. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/25/s...

Patchy frost will be possible again in the Northland tonight with lows in the 30s. Friday will see partly cloudy skies persist with a light wind coming off Lake Superior, keeping more spots in the 50s instead of the 60s for highs. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/22/t...

It will be a chilly night for the Northland with plenty of frost with lows around the freezing point. Monday will be dry and remain cool as clouds increase and winds become strong off Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/18/s...

A high-pressure system will keep skies clear of cloud cover over the Northland tonight and Thursday. After a risk of patchy frost overnight, temperatures will remain seasonal with 50s near Lake Superior, with 60s inland. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/07/w...

A front passing through the Northland tonight will bring partly cloudy skies and a shift in wind direction to the east. That will cool temperatures Wednesday to the upper 40s next to Lake Superior, with 50s and low 60s inland. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/06/t...

A front will settle over the Northland the next few days. After some light fog tonight, the region will see more scattered showers and thunderstorms Thursday. It will be cooler for most as winds come off Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/06/18/w...

A high-pressure system will provide the Northland with some fog tonight, then clear skies and plenty of sunshine for Wednesday. A light wind off Lake Superior will keep highs in the 60s along the shoreline, with 70s further inland. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/07/08/t...

8 P.M. RADAR UPDATE: A scattered line of showers and thunderstorms continue to push through the Northland late this evening. Some have strengthened due to interacting with the lake breeze. More scattered showers and storms will push through tonight.

A high-pressure system will settle near Lake Superior, providing the Northland with clear to partly cloudy skies tonight and Thursday. Winds will shift to blowing off Lake Superior, cooling shoreline communities for highs. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/07/02/w...

Showers and thunderstorms will push out of the Northland tonight, with clearing skies expected Thursday. An east breeze will lead to a cooler day with choppy waters likely along Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/08/27/w...

Clear skies will continue across the Northland tonight and Friday, with low temperatures near seasonal. A shift in wind direction will cool highs to the 60s along and near Lake Superior, with low 70s further inland. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/25/t...

A slow moving storm system will bring plenty of showers and thunderstorms through the Northland tonight and Friday. Winds will remain breezy off Lake Superior, keeping temperatures cool for early fall. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/18/t...

Summer-like weather continues for the Northland with warm lows and highs Wednesday back to the 70s and low 80s. A light wind off Lake Superior will help to make it feel less humid as the sunshine persists. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/16/t...

Snow showers will continue along the southern shoreline of Lake Superior tonight. The rest of the Northland will see some breaks in the cloud cover as winds remain breezy, and temperatures stay cool, for Thanksgiving. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/11/26/w...

The Northland will remain dry tonight and most of Monday, but a few snow showers are possible near the Canadian border. The “cooler by the lake” temperature conditions will be in full force throughout the week. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

A storm system will bring the first of two rounds of light mixed precipitation showers through the Northland late tonight and Wednesday morning. High temperatures will range from the 40s near Lake Superior, to the 50s and 60s further inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

A clipper system will bring scattered rain and snow showers through the Northland tonight. An east wind will form Tuesday under mostly cloudy skies, keeping those along Lake Superior seasonal for highs, with warmer temperatures further inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

The Northland will have to widely scattered rain and snow showers pass through early tonight. Thursday will see a dry and calm day with most highs in the 40s, but it will be cooler by Lake Superior. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

A flow of moisture will bring snow showers chances through the Northland tonight and Tuesday night. A breeze coming off Lake Superior will keep temperatures closer to seasonal the next several days. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: www.fox21online.com/weather/

The fog and freezing drizzle will persist across the Northland tonight, especially near Lake Superior. A storm system will bring rain chances throughout Friday, switching to a mix of rain, sleet, and snow by Friday night. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2026/03/05/t...

FOG AND FREEZING DRIZZLE: The fog coming from Lake Superior is covering more areas of the Northland as we go into Wednesday night. It will persist through Thursday morning. Temperatures are also below freezing, so the drizzle could make surfaces and roadways slick in spots.

TWIN PORTS FOG: A shift in wind direction and cooling temperatures is bringing back the fog to some spots in the Northland this evening. The worst of it will likely be in the Twin Ports and along Lake Superior. We will see how much a Dense Fog Advisory expands through Thursday morning.

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR APRIL 29, 2026: A high-pressure system keeps skies over the #Northland partly #cloudy Tuesday night with very light #winds. Low #temperatures in the 20s and low 30s could lead to patchy #frost away from #LakeSuperior. Tuesday will see a […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Patchy frost will be possible in parts of the Northland away from Lake Superior tonight with partly cloudy skies. Some sprinkles are possible Wednesday as temperatures remain cool for late April standards. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

The dry and warm weather conditions continue in the Northland tonight and Wednesday, with temperatures a bit cooler next to Lake Superior. A southerly breeze returns, increasing the already high fire danger risks. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

The sunny and warm weather pattern continues in the Northland Tuesday. Highs will be in the 50s next to Lake Superior, with 60s further inland. Keep in mind to follow any burning bans and restrictions that will be in place. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

FOG TONIGHT, FIRE RISK THURSDAY Dense fog is still likely near the Lake Superior shoreline region of the Northland tonight and Thursday morning. Thursday will be sunny and dry, but a decent southerly breeze will increase the fire danger west of Highway 53. Plan accordingly.

FOG TONIGHT, FIRE RISK THURSDAY Dense #fog is still likely near the #LakeSuperior shoreline region of the #Northland tonight and Thursday morning. Thursday will be #sunny and #dry, but a decent southerly #breeze will increase the #fire danger west of Highway […] [Original post on newsie.social]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR APRIL 16, 2026: #Fog will be likely next to #LakeSuperior Wednesday night, with mostly #clear skies elsewhere in the #Northland thanks to #calm #winds and lows in the 30s and low 40s. Thursday will see plenty of #sunshine. A southerly […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Dense fog is likely across the Northland tonight with calm winds. A high-pressure system will help clear away cloud cover Wednesday, as a light lake breeze will keep temperatures cooler by Lake Superior. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

Scattered showers will continue across the Northland tonight, with a focus north of Highway 2 Tuesday. Fog will be likely at times due to a lake breeze, which will also keep highs in the 40s where the breeze is felt. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

The Northland will see more cloud cover tonight, but we will remain dry with a new high-pressure system moving into the region Monday. A light lake breeze will keep the “cooler by the lake” conditions ongoing. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 28, 2026: The lake #breeze will #calm Thursday night, allowing for mainly #clear skies across the #Northland with low #temperatures in the 40s and 50s. Friday will see more #clouds, but we remain #dry with #summer-like #heat for […] [Original post on newsie.social]

The lake breeze will calm tonight, allowing everyone in the Northland to see summer-like heat for Friday despite more clouds. Highs will be in the upper 70s and low 80s near Lake Superior, with upper 80s and low 90s farther inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 27, 2026: A high-pressure system will keep the #Northland clear of #cloud cover Wednesday night with some lakeshore #fog in a few spots. Low #temperatures will #cool to the 40s. Thursday will see more #sunshine with not much cloud […] [Original post on newsie.social]

A high-pressure system will keep the Northland clear tonight with lows in the 40s. The sunny skies continue Thursday, as well as a lake breeze. That means 60s for highs next to Lake Superior, with 70s and low 80s more inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 27, 2026: After pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms dissipate early Tuesday night, the #Northland will see mostly #clear skies, some lakeshore #fog, and low #temperatures in the upper 40s and 50s. Wednesday will be basically #sunny […] [Original post on newsie.social]

After pop-up showers and thunderstorms dissipate early tonight, the Northland will see dry conditions settle in the next few days. A decent lake breeze Wednesday will keep highs in the 60s next to Lake Superior, with 70s and 80s further inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

Widely scattered showers and thunderstorms will pass through the northern half of the Northland early tonight. Tuesday will be very warm again, but it will be cooler next to Lake Superior with more pop-up showers in spots. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MEMORIAL DAY 2026: #MemorialDay 2026 will be very warm for the #Northland with #temperatures away from #LakeSuperior in the 80s for highs thanks to plenty of #sunshine and a southerly #wind. Isolated pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Memorial Day 2026 will be very warm for most of the Northland with highs away from Lake Superior in the 80s. Isolated pop-up showers and thunderstorms return for the afternoon and evening, and a few could be strong. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 22, 2026: A high-pressure system keeps the #Northland partly cloudy Thursday night. Low #temperatures in the 30s will allow a bit of patchy #frost to form in a few spots. Friday starts #dry with a lake #breeze keeping highs in the […] [Original post on newsie.social]

A bit of patchy frost is possible in a few spots of the Northland tonight with lows dropping to the 30s. Friday will be dry most of the day and cooler by the lake. Showers and a few thunderstorms return by Friday night. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 21, 2026: More patchy #frost is possible in parts of the #Northland Wednesday night with mainly #clear skies, very light #winds, and lows in the 30s. Thursday will see plenty of #sunshine and highs in the 60s for many of us. A lake […] [Original post on newsie.social]

More frost is possible in parts of the Northland tonight with mainly clear skies and lows in the 30s. Thursday will see more sunshine and highs back near seasonal levels, but a lake breeze will keep those near Lake Superior cooler. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

7:15 P.M. WEATHER UPDATE: Showers and a few weak thunderstorms are beginning to move into the Northland this evening. They will become widespread over the next several hours. Dense fog is also being reported in the Twin Ports region and near Lake Superior. It will improve once the rain arrives.

A warm front will bring plenty of showers and thunderstorms through the Northland tonight and Monday. It will remain cooler by the lake, so expect highs in the 60s by Lake Superior, with 70s further inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JUNE 3, 2026: The #Northland remains #dry Tuesday night with partly #cloudy skies and low #temperatures in the 40s and 50s. Wednesday will see a southerly #breeze help #warm #highs to the 70s by Lake Superior and 80s elsewhere. An […] [Original post on newsie.social]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JUNE 2, 2026: A new high-pressure system to our north will #clear out #cloud cover across the #Northland Monday night, helping to #cool low #temperatures to the 40s. The #sunshine will persist Tuesday as the lake #breeze becomes very […] [Original post on newsie.social]

A new high-pressure system will help to keep nearly all of the clouds away from the Northland tonight and Tuesday. A lighter lake breeze will help to keep the cooler by the lake conditions only along the Lake Superior shorelines. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR NOVEMBER 11, 2024: A departing #storm system will cause strong #winds Sunday night, with some #gusts near #LakeSuperior approaching 50 mph. A few #showers are possible in the Arrowhead region with lows in the upper 20s and low 30s. #VeteransDay Monday will see #clearing […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JANUARY 13, 2025: #Arctic air returns to the #Northland. #Temperatures will be below zero for lows Sunday night, with single digits for highs Monday. A #breezy northwest #wind will keep wind #chills as low as -30°. #Snow #showers will persist near #LakeSuperior through […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JANUARY 6, 2025: The #Northland remains under a #dry and #cold #weather pattern for the next several days. Expect #clear skies for most of us Sunday night with most lows below zero away from #LakeSuperior. #Wind #chills could be as low as -25°. Some #clouds return […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JUNE 19, 2025: As a #front settles over the #Northland, we will be relatively calm with partly #cloudy skies and lows in the 50s. Some light #fog will form in spots. Thursday will see more scattered #showers and #thunderstorms. A #wind shift coming off #LakeSuperior will […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR SEPTEMBER 12, 2025: Dense #fog will be likely in the #TwinPorts and #NorthShore regions of the #Northland Thursday night with lows in the 50s and very light #winds. A #storm system bring #showers and #thunderstorms Friday, with the highest chances north of Highway 2 […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR OCTOBER 22, 2025: A #storm system remains over #LakeSuperior, which will keep scattered #showers ongoing over the #Northland Tuesday night and Wednesday. #Temperatures will remain steady, with lows in the 30s and low 40s and highs in the 40s. #Winds will also remain […]
